nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Arden was born in 1148, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Suvardus De Arden, was 54 and his mother, Mrs. Suvardus De Arden, was 47. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Olivia. He died in 1200, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Arden est né en 1148, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Suvardus De Arden, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Suvardus De Arden, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Olivia. Il est décédé en 1200, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Arden 1148 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Suvardus De Arden 54 und seine Mutter Mrs. Suvardus De Arden 47. Er hatte mit Olivia mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1200 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Arden è nato il nel 1148 nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Suvardus De Arden, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Suvardus De Arden, aveva 47 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Olivia. Morì nel 1200, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Arden(이)가 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Suvardus De Arden(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Suvardus De Arden(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Olivia(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Arden nasceu em 1148, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Suvardus De Arden, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Suvardus De Arden, tinha 47 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Olivia. Ele faleceu em 1200, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Arden родился в 1148 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Suvardus De Arden было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Suvardus De Arden, 47. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Olivia. Он умер в 1200 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Arden nació en 1148, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Suvardus De Arden, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Mrs. Suvardus De Arden, tenía 47 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Olivia. Murió en 1200, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
